channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Brignone beats Goggia for Italian 1-2 in World Cup downhill. Vonn misses gate and does not finish
item.description: Federica Brignone has edged out teammate Sofia Goggia by the smallest possible margin for an Italian 1-2 finish in a women’s World Cup downhill.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team. The Hurricanes acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade Friday night.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The 49ers bring back Robert Saleh for 2nd stint as defensive coordinator
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers hired Robert Saleh for a second stint as defensive coordinator on Friday night after a failed tenure as head coach of the New York Jets. Saleh had been a candidate for head coaching jobs with Jacksonville, Dallas and Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina gets another big win against No. 5 LSU to continue SEC domination
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina showed once more who’s in charge of the Southeastern Conference. The No. 2 Gamecocks (19-1, 7-0 SEC) got 14 points from Joyce Edwards and used their trademark lockdown defense to end No. 5 LSU’s perfect start to the season with a 66-56 victory on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Amber Glenn defends her title at the US Figure Skating Championships as Alysa Liu falters late
item.description: Amber Glenn defended her title as the U.S. Figure Skating Championships, landing a massive triple axel early in the program and then watching in stressful anticipation as Alysa Liu came up just short of surpassing her.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ryan Day hired armed security to protect his family following death threats after Michigan loss
item.description: In the days following Ryan Day walking off the field in Columbus following Ohio State's loss to Michigan to end the regular season, his family’s safety was the main priority after they received death threats from a lunatic fringe of Buckeye fans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Riviera tournament moving to Torrey Pines in San Diego because of LA wildfires
item.description: The PGA Tour is relocating the Genesis Invitational out of wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles, announcing Friday it will be held Feb. 13-16 on the South course at Torrey Pines in San Diego with an emphasis on relief initiatives for victims of the fires.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Pete Carroll headed to Raiders and Liam Coen to Jaguars, 2 coaching openings remain
item.description: Pete Carroll is set to return to the sideline as a head coach following a one-year hiatus and Liam Coen is ready for his first shot at running an NFL team.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Ben Shelton to return to the Australian Open final
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Defending champion Jannik Sinner overcame some third-set cramping and beat Ben Shelton 7-6 (2), 6-2, 6-2 on Friday to return to the Australian Open final as he seeks a third Grand Slam title. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego native signs with SDFC
item.description: Midfielder Luca de la Torre is coming back to San Diego to play for his hometown Major League Soccer team.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC unveils 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is set to kick off its fourth season in the National Women’s Soccer League (NWSL) with an exciting 26-game schedule, the team announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz blow 25-point lead in overtime loss to Pelicans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) - CJ McCollum scored six of his 45 points in overtime and the New Orleans Pelicans orchestrated the largest comeback in franchise history, overcoming a 25-point deficit to beat Utah Jazz 123-119 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State uses first half offensive blitz to extinguish Notre Dame, claim 9th National Championship
item.description: ATLANTA — Notre Dame punched Ohio State in the mouth on the opening drive of the College Football Playoff National Championship, but they forgot to follow with a combination as the Buckeyes got back into the fight with a first half offensive blitz that proved too much to overcome.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers continue offseason dominance, sign All-Star reliever
item.description: As the Los Angeles Dodgers stormed toward the World Series last October, one weakness was consistently brought up for the Boys in Blue: relief pitching.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
